languages.text: "Мы были на Даргонусе… Снова и снова…" {n}Из вокс-решетки раздаются оглушающие помехи, от которых наблюдающие резко морщатся. Себериан пошатывается, прикрывая ладонью лицо — его тонкие пальцы лязгают, встретившись с черепным аугментом. Уже тише, Лорд-капитан произносит:{/n} "Как это возможно?"

"Dargonus'taydık... Tekrar tekrar..." {n}Voks ızgarasından sağır edici bir parazit saçılıyor ve duyma mesafesindekilerin yüzünü buruşturmasına neden oluyor. Seberian sendeliyor. Yüzünü avucuyla kapatıyor, ince parmakları kafatası ogmentine çarparak ses çıkarıyor. Lord Kaptan suskunca konuşuyor.{/n} "Bu nasıl mümkün olabilir?"
languages.original_text: "We were on Dargonus... Again and again..." {n}Deafening interference blasts from the vox-grille, causing those in earshot to wince. Seberian staggers, covering his face with his palm, his thin fingers clanking against his cranial augmetic. Quieter now, the Lord Captain says,{/n} "How is this possible?"

traits.locale_text: "Dargonus'taydık... Tekrar tekrar..." {n}Voks ızgarasından sağır edici bir parazit saçılıyor ve duyma mesafesindekilerin yüzünü buruşturmasına neden oluyor. Seberian sendeliyor. Себериан пошатывается, прикрывая ладонью лицо — его тонкие пальцы лязгают, встретившись с черепным аугментом. Уже тише, Лорд-капитан произносит:{/n} "Как это возможно?"

Seberian staggers, covering his face with his palm, his thin fingers clanking against his cranial augmetic. Quieter now, the Lord Captain says:{/n} "How is this possible?"

Seberian staggers, covering his face with his palm, his thin fingers clanking against his cranial augmetic. Quieter now, the Lord Captain says,{/n} "How is this possible?"

languages.text: "Wir waren auf Dargonus ... Wieder und immer wieder ..." {n}Ohrenbetäubende Interferenzen aus dem Vox-Gitter lassen alle Umstehenden in Hörweite zusammenzucken. Seberian taumelt, hält sich die Hand vor sein Gesicht und trommelt mit den Fingern gegen sein Schädelimplantat. Etwas leiser fragt der Lord Captain:{/n} "Wie ist das möglich?"
languages.original_text: "We were on Dargonus... Again and again..." {n}Deafening interference blasts from the vox-grille, causing those in earshot to wince. Seberian staggers, covering his face with his palm, his thin fingers clanking against his cranial augmetic. Quieter now, the Lord Captain says,{/n} "How is this possible?"

traits.locale_text: "Wir waren auf Dargonus ... Wieder und immer wieder ..." {n}Ohrenbetäubende Interferenzen aus dem Vox-Gitter lassen alle Umstehenden in Hörweite zusammenzucken. Seberian taumelt, hält sich die Hand vor sein Gesicht und trommelt mit den Fingern gegen sein Schädelimplantat. Etwas leiser fragt der Lord Captain:{/n} "Wie ist das möglich?"

languages.text: « Nous étions sur Dargonus... Encore et encore... » {n}La grille-vox émet soudain des parasites assourdissants, faisant grimacer les personnes alentour. Seberian perd l'équilibre et porte une main à son visage, ses doigts fins cliquetant contre son augmétique crânien. D'une voix plus faible, le seigneur-capitaine demande :{/n} « Comment est-ce possible ? »
languages.original_text: "We were on Dargonus... Again and again..." {n}Deafening interference blasts from the vox-grille, causing those in earshot to wince. Seberian staggers, covering his face with his palm, his thin fingers clanking against his cranial augmetic. Quieter now, the Lord Captain says,{/n} "How is this possible?"

traits.locale_text: « Nous étions sur Dargonus... Encore et encore... » {n}La grille-vox émet soudain des parasites assourdissants, faisant grimacer les personnes alentour. Seberian perd l'équilibre et porte une main à son visage, ses doigts fins cliquetant contre son augmétique crânien. D'une voix plus faible, le seigneur-capitaine demande :{/n} « Comment est-ce possible ? »

languages.text: «Estábamos en Dargonus... Una y otra vez...». {n}Una interferencia ensordecedora emerge de su rejilla de voco, causando muecas de dolor en quienes lo oyen. Seberian trastabilla mientras se cubre el rostro con la mano, con los dedos delgados golpeteando contra su aumento craneal. Más tranquilo, el Lord Capitán pregunta: {/n} «¿Cómo es posible?».
languages.original_text: "We were on Dargonus... Again and again..." {n}Deafening interference blasts from the vox-grille, causing those in earshot to wince. Seberian staggers, covering his face with his palm, his thin fingers clanking against his cranial augmetic. Quieter now, the Lord Captain says,{/n} "How is this possible?"

traits.locale_text: «Estábamos en Dargonus... Una y otra vez...». {n}Una interferencia ensordecedora emerge de su rejilla de voco, causando muecas de dolor en quienes lo oyen. Seberian trastabilla mientras se cubre el rostro con la mano, con los dedos delgados golpeteando contra su aumento craneal. Más tranquilo, el Lord Capitán pregunta: {/n} «¿Cómo es posible?».

languages.text: “我们当时在达戈努斯……一遍又一遍……”{n}音阵格栅里爆发出一阵刺耳的干扰音，周围的人都忍不住皱眉。塞贝里安踉跄了一下，用手捂住脸，细长的手指磕在颅骨生体强化上，咔咔作响。舰长大人稍微平静下来，说道：{/n}“这怎么可能？”
languages.original_text: "We were on Dargonus... Again and again..." {n}Deafening interference blasts from the vox-grille, causing those in earshot to wince. Seberian staggers, covering his face with his palm, his thin fingers clanking against his cranial augmetic. Quieter now, the Lord Captain says,{/n} "How is this possible?"

traits.locale_text: “我们当时在达戈努斯……一遍又一遍……”{n}音阵格栅里爆发出一阵刺耳的干扰音，周围的人都忍不住皱眉。塞贝里安踉跄了一下，用手捂住脸，细长的手指磕在颅骨生体强化上，咔咔作响。舰长大人稍微平静下来，说道：{/n}“这怎么可能？”

languages.text: 「私たちはドラゴナスにいた... またまた...」{n}ヴォックス・グリルの轟音の妨害が耳に届き、近くにいる者は顔をしかめた。セベリアンはよろめき、顔を掌で覆い、薄い指が頭部の増幅器にぶつかった。静かになった今、ロード・キャプテンは言う。「これはどうなっているんだ？」{/n}

Seberian staggers, covering his face with his palm, his thin fingers clanking against his cranial augmetic. Quieter now, the Lord Captain says,{/n} "How is this possible?"
